evals.prompt: Decompose spec 002 into a linear standard plan. The spec has requirements.md and solution.md describing a single-feature notification API.
evals.expected_output: plan/README.md manifest with phase checklist and one or more plan/phase-N.md files containing TDD-structured tasks
expectations: Read requirements.md before defining tasks
Read solution.md before defining tasks
Read AGENTS.md for codebase context
Wrote plan/README.md from the standard template
plan/README.md frontmatter has title, status, version fields
plan/README.md Context Priming section includes paths to requirements.md and solution.md
plan/README.md phases checklist uses exact format: - [ ] [Phase N: Title](phase-N.md)
Wrote at least one plan/phase-N.md file
Each phase-N.md has YAML frontmatter with title, status, version, phase fields
Each phase-N.md status is pending on creation
Tasks follow TDD pattern: Prime, Test, Implement, Validate
Tasks have specification references using [ref: solution/Section X] or [ref: requirements/AC-Y] format
Tasks use [activity: type] hints for specialist selection
Parallel-eligible tasks are marked with [parallel: true]
Final phase includes integration and E2E test tasks
No time estimates appear in any phase file
No implementation code appears in any phase file
Did NOT create units/ or scenarios/ directories

evals.prompt: Validate the standard plan in spec 003. The plan has missing [ref: ...] annotations on several tasks and a phase file is not linked from plan/README.md.
evals.expected_output: Validation report identifying the missing references and the orphan phase file, with the plan flagged as incomplete
expectations: Read plan/README.md and parsed the phases checklist
Read each phase-N.md file referenced in the checklist
Detected at least one task without [ref: ...] annotation
Detected the phase file that is not linked from plan/README.md
Reported plan status as DRAFT or IN_REVIEW (not COMPLETE)
Listed actionable next steps to address the gaps
Did not auto-fix issues without user approval
